turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, yeh TPA ka matter hai. Meri company ka group mediclaim hai — United India Insurance. Aapke yahan cover hota hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji haan, United India Insurance ke saath humara empanelment hai. Group mediclaim bhi acceptable hai generally. Aapki policy number hai kya?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Theek hai. Aap kaunsa treatment ya department ke liye aa rahe hain?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Surgery plan hai. Gallbladder ki. Doctor ne bola hai laparoscopic karna padega.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Samajh gaya. Iske liye aapko pre-authorisation letter lena hoga apni insurance company se ya TPA se. Aap woh letter lekar aayein, hum apni end se process shuru kar denge. Insurance desk subah 9 baje se sham 5 baje tak hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay. Aur koi documents aur chahiye?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan — ID proof, original policy document, aur doctor ki prescription ya referral. Yeh sab lekar aaiye, aur koi problem nahi hogi.
